summary: So. It’s been a while. And with that comes probably my last piece of writing for... well, a while. It has honestly been such a journey; I’ve made new friendships, met new people, listened to amazing groups and discovered amazing music but it just doesn’t have the same appeal it once did. Perhaps it’s just a bad year and that’s tainted all my hobbies and interests I used to love or maybe it’s just life - who knows! But one thing still close to my heart is writing and I don’t think I’ll ever stop scribbling words down in the hopes of making them sound nice but I think my time with fan fiction has ended! I wanted to write a final piece for my collection, a little way of saying goodbye. I never like to say never (ha!), I always like to keep my doors open so there’s a chance I may come back, who knows what could happen. But I have to pen the end of this chapter. I’m grateful to every single person who has ever read any work of mine, given feedback, messaged or commented on my works. You all gave me the motivation, desire and energy to write more and provide more content. To anyone reading this, I wish you the absolute best and I love you! I’ll still be around to answer any questions and I’ll do my best to reply to any comments! Peace out, hotties! 💋 (Please note: I haven’t written in a while so I’m a bit rusty and I’ve only proof read it a couple of times so apologies for any typos!)
